title: 大阪杯の後に・やるしかなくない？

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant... Pant...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: (This... freaking... hurts... Can't... breathe...)

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: (So this... is a senior G1...)

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Hey, what gives?! Where's all the energy, folks?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Show us your burning passion! Show us your
burning hearts! Eat some burning fish!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: (What is her deal?! How can...)

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Aggghhh! She's so annoying!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
I hate how dumb she is! And how strong she is in
spite of that! And how much fun she has running!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: But I'm not gonna lose!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Hahaha!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Aghhh... Come ooon...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: I've never been so tired in my life, but...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: But I'm not gonna lose!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
I'm exhausted. I'm sore. But I think... I think I
yelled as loud as I could after it was over.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: By the way, what's our next goal again?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: The spring Tenno Sho, obviously.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Ugh. Golshi...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Hey, you! You think the war between us is over
after just one little skirmish?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
You've gotta be kidding. I thought you said you
were gonna completely obliterate me?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Oblit...er...ate?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Dumb remarks aside—

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Huh?! You're the dumb one! That's why I'm gonna
surpass you!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Then I guess we're going into overtime to decide
who's the strongest. Lookin' forward to our next
bout.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Hey. Wait!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: What is with her?!
choice_data_list: So, you up for the Tenno Sho?
So, you up for the Tenno Sho?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Obviously! If I'm gonna do this, I'm gonna go all
the way!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
At 3,200 meters, the spring Tenno Sho is a
long-distance race suited for stayers, in addition
to attracting some of the most talented seniors.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
See if I care! I'm done worrying about
complicated stuff!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna beat Golshi. That's all I need to think
about.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her declaration is so simple and powerful, it's
hard to believe she's the same runner who fell into
a slump after the Arima Kinen.
choice_data_list: You can still get stronger yet.
You can still get stronger yet.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Duh! I mean...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: I'm gonna make it big! Super big!
